description: Style NoteMake a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leather handbag from hidekraft. With stylish handles and legs at the base, this bag makes for a fab combination of style and practicality.Product DetailsPurple handbag made of leatherHas a long adjustable handle so that you can sling it on your shouldersOne main zippered compartment with a zippered pocket and organiser sleevesOne insert pocket on the front and one zippered pocket at the backBranding embossed on the frontMetal feet on baseWarranty: 180 daysMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 25 cmWidth: 32 cmDepth: 8 cm
